title: Hello and Welcome, I’m Geovanni Flores!
text:
Currently I am a student at Cal Poly Pomona perusing my bachelors degree in business, majoring in marketing. I have gained experience through social media management, and now newly learned data analysis.
Fun fact: I have a passion in traveling and taking photos!
